summary: Fixes Inbox header overlap and rounds the Settings sidebar border.

fixed: Inbox no longer breaks the header — only the active account's Gmail web view is shown instead of all cached mail web views
Embedded web views are clipped in an AppKit container so Gmail content cannot paint over the toolbar
Switching away from Inbox, Chat, or Calendar hides web views without re-showing every cached view on the active pane
changed: Settings sidebar menu has a rounded outer border
